title: marsdenia mollis
intro: Marsdenia mollis, also known as the soft moonseed or velvet moonseed, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, native to tropical Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to alleviate pain and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Marsdenia mollis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and act as an anticonvulsant, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
